purpose: Run one Harbor-guided evolution per consultation family with a prospectively frozen train/dev/holdout pilot, then complement the live answer evidence with the frozen forty-question deterministic retrieval benchmark.
evolution_limit: Exactly one independently named standalone candidate per family. No edits after holdout is opened.

network_isolation.reason: Harbor 0.18.0 egress-control sidecars fail on the local WSL Docker host; both phases run public, while the verifier remains a separate offline-code image without bundle or authentication mounts.

interpretation_limit: This live campaign is a one-case-per-cohort pilot. It measures contract integrity, evidence validity and sufficiency, latency, and tokens; it is not a statistically powered estimate of semantic answer quality.
